## Grade Key

| Grade | Criteria |
|---|---|
| **A** | depth ≥5, acc ≥0.80 — full lifecycle |
| **B** | depth ≥4, acc ≥0.60 — nearly complete |
| **C** | depth ≥2 — partial chain |
| **F** | depth 0 — no engagement |

**Audit ✓/✗/~**: direct single-tool call to Ollama

**Chain depth**: steps completed / 6 max  
(models often repeat steps — depth can exceed 6)

**Order acc**: fraction of steps in correct lifecycle order

## Top Performers

| Model | Grade | Depth |
|---|---|---|
| hermes3:8b | A | 13 |
| Huihui-Qwable-27B | A | 12 |
| Qwen3-Coder-Next-abl | A | 12 |
| glm-4.7-flash | A | 11 |
| gemma4:e4b-it-qat | A | 10 |
| Qwable-27B | A | 10 |

## Notable

- **hermes3:8b** tops the chart — small but thorough
- **lfm2.5:8b** (fastest model) also grade A
- **Nex-N2-mini** A despite audit=text_only
- **devstral:24b** only B — stalls before persist
- **mistral-small3.2** only C — stops after start
- **qwen3.6:27b-q4_K_M** F — format error at q4
  (q8_0 variant scores A at depth 9)

## Methodology

6-step lab lifecycle via Ollama tool-call API.  
Models tested: 2026-06-19/20.  
Ollama 0.30.10, Apple M4 Pro, 64 GB.
